message:
feat(policy): add metrics_dashboard() to PolicyEngine for unified subsystem metrics

Wires PolicyMetricsCollector into PolicyEngine, aggregating metrics from all
5 subsystems (decision log, compliance engine, quarantine registry, audit chain,
credential broker) into a single PolicyMetricsDashboard. This bridges the gap
where PolicyMetricsCollector existed but was never instantiated by PolicyEngine.

Includes metrics_dashboard_with_thresholds() for custom health thresholds.
6 integration tests covering empty engine, decision log, quarantine, kill switch,
audit chain, and custom thresholds scenarios. All 366 policy tests pass.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>
